ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.RestrictionsOnAwardsTxt: LIMITED TO RESIDENTS OF CHESTER COUNTY, ATTENDING POST-SECONDARY INSTITUTIONS. SCHOLARSHIPS ARE NOT AVAILABLE FOR GRADUATE STUDIES.
